headings.strategy: Expressive, emotional serif. Use tracking-tight for large headings. Elegant and warm.

body.strategy: Warm, clean humanist sans for readability.

layout.spacing_strategy: Generous. p-8, p-16, p-24. High negative space to create emotional breathing room. Cinematic layout.
layout.grid_strategy: Mode A: The Tetris Grid. Asymmetric, overlapping elements for the story section to make it feel like an editorial spread.

components.buttons: Rounded-full, solid terracotta (#C85A17) with white text. Hover: slightly lighter, -translate-y-1, shadow-lg.
components.cards: Soft warm borders. bg-[#F4EFE6] with rounded-3xl and border border-[#E6D5B8]. Generous inner padding p-8.
components.progress_bar: Thick (h-6 or h-8), rounded-full, with an animated terracotta fill. Organic feel.
components.icons: lucide-react for copy-to-clipboard, heart, calendar, map-pin. Keep stroke width 1.5 for elegance.

hero_image.description: Silhouette of a boat on the sea at warm sunset. Represents the journey and longing for home.
hero_image.placement: Hero section background or large bento grid hero. Max overlay opacity bg-white/30 if used as background to keep it bright and warm.

reunion_image.placement: End of page / Next to the donation methods.

sections_and_content.name: Header
sections_and_content.instructions: Sticky glass header. Brand text 'Para o Wilson'. Links: 'A História', 'A Meta', 'Contribuir'. CTA 'Doar Agora'. z-50.

sections_and_content.name: Hero
sections_and_content.instructions: Large typographic hero. H1: 'Vamos levar o Wilson a casa.' (Playfair Display, text-5xl md:text-6xl+, tracking-tight, text-[#2C2621]). Subtitle: 'Desde Timor até Lisboa, a saudade de Moçambique só cresceu. Neste aniversário, o presente somos nós que damos.' Use hero_image as a large asymmetrical block next to or behind the text.

sections_and_content.name: The Journey
sections_and_content.instructions: A timeline or 3-part bento grid. 1) 'Maio 2023: Partida para Timor.' 2) 'Junho 2025: Chegada a Lisboa.' 3) 'O Sonho: Voltar a Moçambique para abraçar a família.' High spacing, elegant typography.

sections_and_content.name: Goal & Countdown
sections_and_content.instructions: Goal: €1.000. Big progress bar (terracotta). 'Prazo: 20 de Junho' 'Aniversário: 25 de Junho'.

sections_and_content.name: Donation Methods
sections_and_content.instructions: 3 elegant cards: MBWay, Revolut, IBAN. For MBWay/Revolut: 913419879 (Luís Morais Leitão). Include a simple 'Copiar' icon button (lucide-react copy icon) for each.

sections_and_content.name: Team
sections_and_content.instructions: Simple, elegant text centered: 'Com muito amor: Sancha, Gonçalo, Jess, Ana, Lu e Joana.' Use reunion_image beautifully masked or placed above this.

accessibility_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons must elevate and darken slightly. Copy buttons must trigger a toast 'Copiado!' using sonner.
accessibility_and_interactions.testing: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid (e.g., 'copy-mbway-button', 'donate-hero-cta').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use React/Tailwind/Lucide/Framer Motion. Install 'lucide-react', 'framer-motion', 'clsx', 'tailwind-merge', 'sonner'. Create an emotional, cinematic feel with warm earthy colors. Do NOT use generic tech UI patterns. The copy-to-clipboard functionality is critical. Add Google Fonts @import for 'Playfair Display' and 'Outfit' in index.css.
